data.title: BODlife

seo.title: BODlife Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Find your reliable source health, fitness and nutrition with BODlife, and go behind-the-scenes at Beachbody to see how we incorporate healthy living into everything we do.

data.descriptionShort: Find out what’s happening in health, fitness and nutrition at BODlife
data.descriptionLong: Your reliable source of the latest in health, fitness and nutrition, BODlife puts the fun into fitness and living a healthier lifestyle with tips, exclusive behind the scenes access, and inside info​.
data.descriptionOverview: BODlife puts the fun into fitness and healthy living with news, tips, behind the scenes access.

modules.descriptionOverview: BODlife puts the fun into fitness and healthy living with news, tips, behind the scenes access.

modules.title: Your Reliable Source for the Latest in Health, Fitness and Nutrition
modules.content: BODlife is the channel that delivers inspiration and information for living a healthy lifestyle. Discover the latest in healthy living trends, tips and tutorials to get you in the right mindset plus exclusive insights from the experts at Beachbody. Our stories are here to fuel your success,  whether you’re just getting started or need help getting to the next level. Remember: health and fitness aren’t supposed to be a chore, they’re meant to make you feel great every step of the way!

modules.title: Your Exclusive All-Access Pass to Beachbody
modules.content: Go behind-the-scenes at Beachbody and see how we incorporate healthy living into (almost) everything we do. Get to know the Beachbody Super Trainers — find out how they fuel themselves when the cameras are off, and learn why they’ve dedicated their lives to helping thousands of people kickstart and maintain their fitness journeys. And get a first-ever peek behind the curtain to see how some of the biggest events in health and fitness come together, from the annual Beachbody Summit to special celebrations with some of our partners.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQKSOu.title: “Feed the Beast” with Idalis Velazquez
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQKSOu.descriptionLong: What’s for dinner in the Velazquez household? Idalis invites you into her kitchen to make a family favorite.

trainers.bio: Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of BODi's Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30-Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQKTiC.title: BODi Live Group Fitness Revolution/ Premiere Week
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQKTiC.descriptionLong: BODi is here! Check out what all the hype is about. Join the Bodcast and discover how you can be a part of a fitness community from the comfort of your own living room.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Shaun T has helped millions of people get in the best shape of their lives with his transformational fitness programs. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.

Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Jennifer Jacobs is an NASM certified personal trainer, nutrition coach, and fitness nutrition specialist, as well as a certified indoor cycling instructor through Schwinn and the AFAA. Known for her functional training workouts, Jennifer will help you stay accountable and unleash your best self.

Jericho McMatthews’ passionate approach to fitness empowers you to own your health, wellness, and happiness. She’s a NASM and ACE certified personal trainer and holds degrees in psychology as well as physical education and kinesiology.

Joel Freeman is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of top programs like LIIFT MORE™, 10 Rounds™, and LIIFT4®. For 20 years, he’s helped people crush their fitness goals and unlock their athletic potential.

"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of BODi's Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30-Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQKXaS.title: “Grocery Run” with Ilana Muhlstein
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQKXaS.descriptionLong: 2B Mindset’s Ilana Muhlstein shows you healthy eating does not need to be boring. Check out her supermarket essentials (hint: it’s a lot of veggies).

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZJfOpT.title: Ilana Muhlstein: 7 Tips to Recover From Your Holiday Binge

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.
